documentation.description: This package contains the routines used for Wide_[Wide_]Character'Width

subprograms.name: Width_Wide_Character
subprograms.code:
function Width_Wide_Character
  (Lo, Hi : Wide_Character) return Natural

documentation.description:
Compute Width attribute for non-static type derived from Wide_Character.
The arguments are the low and high bounds for the type.

subprograms.name: Width_Wide_Wide_Character
subprograms.code:
function Width_Wide_Wide_Character
  (Lo, Hi : Wide_Wide_Character) return Natural

documentation.description: Same function for type derived from Wide_Wide_Character
